A '''battle''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]] occurred between [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and forces loyal to [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], in response to Zsinj's scouting of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] base at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].

Smuggler [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] reported that Zsinj's scout ship, the [[Dwarf Star-class freighter|''Dwarf Star''-class freighter]] ''[[Vengeance Derra IV]]'', had been sighted at [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]], and two flights from Rogue Squadron, under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Aril Nunb]], were sent to investigate. They found the ''Vengeance Derra IV'' in orbit, docking with the [[Transport/Legends|medium transport]] ''[[Contruum's Pride]]''. [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] native [[Pash Cracken]] realized that the freighter was not actually from his home planet, because it did not follow Contruum naming conventions. The Zsinj ships detected the incoming [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], and launched a dozen [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]. The Rogues quickly dispatched the TIEs, and crippled the ''Vengeance Derra IV'' with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. The ''Contruum's Pride'' surrendered and caught the other freighter with its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], preventing it from crashing into Mrisst. Both freighters were then taken in custody by the New Republic.
